aggregation_method: take the most frequent out of all the symptoms
new_question: In the last 6 months, how often have you had any of the following: headaches, stomachaches, backaches, felt dizzy?
How often do you usually have breakfast (more than a glass of milk or fruit juice) in a week?
How many times a week do you usually eat fruits or vegetables?
How many times a week do you usually eat sweets or drink soft drinks?
I feel that my teachers care about and accept me.
How often have you been bullied at school in the past couple of months?
I can count on my friends when things go wrong or to talk about my problems with.
How often do you have ONLINE contact with friends?

On the internet, I talk more
easily about my thoughts/feelings
than in a face-to-face encounter
I get the emotional help and support I need (eg. talking about my problems) from my family.
